result.stdout:
Description:
  TiaCC - Test Impact Analysis for C/C++

Usage:
  TiaCC.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  init       Initialize a new TiaCC database
  scan       Scan source files and extract symbols
  map        Map coverage data to source files
  export     Export data for dashboard visualization
  query      Query affected tests for changed files
  stats      Show database statistics
  recommend  Recommend tests based on Git changes
  run        Run affected tests based on Git changes
  config     Manage TiaCC configuration
  split      Split tests into groups for parallel execution

commands.payload:
Description:

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

  init       Initialize a new TiaCC database
  scan       Scan source files and extract symbols
  map        Map coverage data to source files
  export     Export data for dashboard visualization
  query      Query affected tests for changed files
  stats      Show database statistics
  recommend  Recommend tests based on Git changes
  run        Run affected tests based on Git changes
  config     Manage TiaCC configuration
  split      Split tests into groups for parallel execution

Description:

Usage:

result.stdout:
Description:
  Initialize configuration file

Usage:
  TiaCC.Cli config init [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path>  Path for config file (default: .tiacc/config.json)
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Export data for dashboard visualization

Usage:
  TiaCC.Cli export [options]

Options:
  -d, --db <db>          Path to the SQLite database file [default: impact_map.db]
  -o, --output <output>  Output directory for JSON files [default: ./artifacts/tiacc-data/dashboard]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Map coverage data to source files

Usage:
  TiaCC.Cli map [options]

Options:
  -d, --db <db>                         Path to the SQLite database file [default: impact_map.db]
  -c, --coverage <coverage> (REQUIRED)  Path to coverage file (JSON/XML/LCOV)
  -t, --test <test> (REQUIRED)          Test script name
  -b, --base-dir <base-dir>             Base directory for resolving file paths [default: .]
  -?, -h, --help                        Show help and usage information

  -t, --test <test> (REQUIRED)          Test script name
  -b, --base-dir <base-dir>             Base directory for resolving file paths [default: .]
  -?, -h, --help                        Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Query affected tests for changed files

Usage:
  TiaCC.Cli query [options]

Options:
  -d, --db <db>                   Path to the SQLite database file [default: impact_map.db]
  -f, --files <files> (REQUIRED)  Changed file paths
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information

  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Recommend tests based on Git changes

Usage:
  TiaCC.Cli recommend [options]

Options:
  -d, --db <db>          Path to the SQLite database file [default: impact_map.db]
  -B, --base <base>      Base Git ref for comparison (default: auto-detect)
  -H, --head <head>      Head Git ref for comparison (default: current)
  -u, --uncommitted      Include uncommitted changes [default: True]
  -F, --format <format>  Output format (list, json, ci) [default: list]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Recommend tests based on Git changes

Usage:
  TiaCC.Cli recommend [options]

Options:
  -d, --db <db>          Path to the SQLite database file [default: impact_map.db]
  -B, --base <base>      Base Git ref for comparison (default: auto-detect)
  -H, --head <head>      Head Git ref for comparison (default: current)
  -u, --uncommitted      Include uncommitted changes [default: True]
  -F, --format <format>  Output format (list, json, ci) [default: list]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Run affected tests based on Git changes

Usage:
  TiaCC.Cli run [options]

Options:
  -d, --db <db>          Path to the SQLite database file [default: impact_map.db]
  -B, --base <base>      Base Git ref for comparison (default: auto-detect)
  -H, --head <head>      Head Git ref for comparison (default: current)
  -u, --uncommitted      Include uncommitted changes [default: True]
  -r, --runner <runner>  Test runner command (e.g., dotnet test, pytest, npm test) [default: dotnet test]
  -a, --args <args>      Additional arguments to pass to the test runner
  --dry-run              Show what would be run without executing [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Run affected tests based on Git changes

Usage:
  TiaCC.Cli run [options]

Options:
  -d, --db <db>          Path to the SQLite database file [default: impact_map.db]
  -B, --base <base>      Base Git ref for comparison (default: auto-detect)
  -H, --head <head>      Head Git ref for comparison (default: current)
  -u, --uncommitted      Include uncommitted changes [default: True]
  -r, --runner <runner>  Test runner command (e.g., dotnet test, pytest, npm test) [default: dotnet test]
  -a, --args <args>      Additional arguments to pass to the test runner
  --dry-run              Show what would be run without executing [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Scan source files and extract symbols

Usage:
  TiaCC.Cli scan [options]

Options:
  -d, --db <db>            Path to the SQLite database file [default: impact_map.db]
  -D, --dir <dir>          Directory to scan for source files [default: .]
  -p, --pattern <pattern>  File patterns to include (e.g., *.cs *.cpp *.h) [default: *.cs|*.cpp|*.c|*.h|*.hpp]
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Scan source files and extract symbols

Usage:
  TiaCC.Cli scan [options]

Options:
  -d, --db <db>            Path to the SQLite database file [default: impact_map.db]
  -D, --dir <dir>          Directory to scan for source files [default: .]
  -p, --pattern <pattern>  File patterns to include (e.g., *.cs *.cpp *.h) [default: *.cs|*.cpp|*.c|*.h|*.hpp]
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Split tests into groups for parallel execution

Usage:
  TiaCC.Cli split [options]

Options:
  -d, --db <db>          Path to the SQLite database file [default: impact_map.db]
  -B, --base <base>      Base Git ref for comparison (default: auto-detect)
  -H, --head <head>      Head Git ref for comparison (default: current)
  -u, --uncommitted      Include uncommitted changes [default: True]
  -n, --count <count>    Number of groups to split into (minimum: 1) [default: 4]
  -i, --index <index>    Return only the Nth group (0-based)
  -m, --mode <mode>      Split mode: round-robin, balanced, or random [default: round-robin]
  -F, --format <format>  Output format (list, json, ci) [default: list]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Split tests into groups for parallel execution

Usage:
  TiaCC.Cli split [options]

Options:
  -d, --db <db>          Path to the SQLite database file [default: impact_map.db]
  -B, --base <base>      Base Git ref for comparison (default: auto-detect)
  -H, --head <head>      Head Git ref for comparison (default: current)
  -u, --uncommitted      Include uncommitted changes [default: True]
  -n, --count <count>    Number of groups to split into (minimum: 1) [default: 4]
  -i, --index <index>    Return only the Nth group (0-based)
  -m, --mode <mode>      Split mode: round-robin, balanced, or random [default: round-robin]
  -F, --format <format>  Output format (list, json, ci) [default: list]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
